limitations: Zero observed failures in a finite local sample is not zero risk.
No production browser, selected-Chrome, Developer ID, notarization, Gatekeeper, or live TCC claim is made.
The active hardening freeze remains in force.

metrics.limitations: Dynamic session wrappers are excluded because their resolved inner command is independently policy evaluated.
metrics.scope: Complete current runtime tool registry, curated policy table, effective ActionSpecs, and hostile unknown names.
metrics.threshold: 0 generated privileged specs and 0 protected actions without confirmation

metrics.limitations: Finite local adapters and SQLite do not prove browser, XPC, power-loss, or hostile-filesystem behavior.
metrics.scope: Deterministic claim-to-dispatch target-fence drift through the durable control runtime.
metrics.threshold: 0 mutations and 0 dispatches in at least 10000 race-injected actions

metrics.limitations: Explicit recovery is a separate reconciliation operation and remains covered by focused crash tests.
metrics.scope: Deterministic uncertain adapter outcomes through the durable control runtime.
metrics.threshold: 0 automatic redispatches across at least 1000 unknown mutation outcomes

metrics.limitations: The corpus is deterministic and finite; the 100,000-frame protocol fuzzer covers byte-level parser faults separately.
metrics.scope: Closed typed-program root, action, transform, reference, mutation-finality, and capability-ceiling schemas.
metrics.threshold: 0 arbitrary program accepts across at least 1000 randomized malformed plans

metrics.limitations: Focused tests cover logs, receipts, encrypted artifacts, and memory; live browser/native surfaces remain unavailable.
metrics.scope: Nested credentials, content, URLs, selectors, and adversarially unique canaries.
metrics.threshold: 0 raw canaries in at least 1000 audit and telemetry projections

metrics.limitations: In-process deterministic fuzzing is not a native-host, XPC, browser-process, or memory-sanitizer run.
metrics.scope: Bounded fragmented David control frames across 25 mutation classes, including prompt-like extra fields.
metrics.threshold: 0 crashes, OOMs, or unexpected accepts in at least 100000 malformed frames

metrics.limitations: Finite adapters do not establish that a future native or browser adapter observes a real external target correctly.
metrics.scope: Deterministic mutation, reconciliation, evidence binding, journal transition, and signed receipt path.
metrics.threshold: 100% of at least 1000 successful mutations have a fresh bound postcondition

metrics.limitations: Synthetic local token estimates do not establish task completion, model quality, screenshot reduction, or cross-harness advantage.
metrics.scope: Model-free deferred-tool, semantic-supersession, and artifact-backed typed-program cells.
metrics.threshold: at least 5 repetitions and at least 50% token reduction

metrics.limitations: Passing deterministic tests cannot substitute for live production browser, extension, native signing, or TCC evidence.
metrics.scope: Current Python import under the qualification environment and source-owned hardening tests.
metrics.threshold: focused race, crash, policy, privacy, program, browser, and network contract suite passes

metrics.limitations: A current image is locally attested, but no native-platform live broker session or repeated task matrix satisfies M5.
metrics.scope: Production managed-browser task matrix with frozen fixtures and independent checkers.
metrics.threshold: at least 95% supported-task completion over at least five cold/warm rotated repetitions

metrics.limitations: The observe-only package is not installed, paired, connected, or live-granted.
metrics.scope: Installed selected-tab Chrome extension/native-host task matrix.
metrics.threshold: at least 90% supported-task completion over at least five cold/warm rotated repetitions

metrics.limitations: No production browser or signed native task runner is available for a fair matched baseline.
metrics.scope: Matched live task cells with action, screenshot, confirmation, token, and policy counts.
metrics.threshold: at least 90% semantic routes and at least 70% screenshot reduction versus screenshot-only

metrics.limitations: Contracts and a probe container pass, but the exact public-browser topology remains unproven.
metrics.scope: Live production browser, broker, selected-tab, redirect, DNS, and peer-pin fault matrix.
metrics.threshold: 0 default-profile, cookie, storage, password, incognito, internal-page, or private-network accesses

metrics.limitations: The matching Linux image has local zero-lag evidence, but this report has no current hosted native-platform or registry-provenance result.
metrics.scope: Exact pinned production version versus a current authoritative stable-release observation.
metrics.threshold: browser security update lag no more than 72 hours
